input.background: If a parallel system consists of 3 independent components, each having 0.95 reliability, then the system reliability is given by R=1-(1-0.95)^3=0.9999.
input.question: The mean time to failure of the system can be obtained M_tbf=∫_0^∞ R(t) dt=∫_0^∞ (1-∏_{i=1}^n (1-e^(-λ_i t))) dt.
